title: buildah bud --iidfile functionality is missing
body:
**Description**
`buildah bud --iidfile` is missing and needs to be provided.  This is functionality that Docker has.

#599 is the parent issue for this issue.

**Output of `buildah version`:**

Buildah v0.16

comments.body: Ugh, just noted this should be --iidfile, my bad cut/paste from last night.  Sorry @rhatdan
